# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Performance and engine fixes**

## Highlights

This unreleased build brings significant P/Invoke hot-path optimisations and upstream Skia m151 bug fixes. Four allocation-free interop improvements cut per-call heap pressure in HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper, while two upstream Skia sync merges carry engine-level bug fixes from Chrome m151.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged** — Two rounds of upstream Chrome/m151 patches have been pulled in, bringing rendering correctness and stability improvements from the Skia project. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing optimised with ReadOnlySpan overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, avoiding string allocations on hot paths and improving throughput for colour-lookup-heavy workloads. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions unsafe modifier removed** — The unnecessary unsafe keyword on GRContextOptions has been dropped; consuming code no longer needs to allow unsafe blocks to reference this type. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper interop made allocation-free** — Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encode instead of allocating, Tag.Parse and SKFourByteTag.Parse drop their per-call char[4] allocations, and SKShaper glyph results are read via zero-copy spans — reducing GC pressure on text-shaping hot paths. ([#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
